name: Russell Jones
bio: Web developer and community builder from Sagamok Anishnawbek. Creator of minoo.live — an Indigenous knowledge and community platform.

name: Charlotte Southwind
bio: Beadwork artist from Sagamok Anishnawbek, creating handmade beaded earrings and accessories.

name: Nginaajiiw Salon Owner
bio: Owner and operator of Nginaajiiw Salon & Spa in Sagamok Anishnawbek, providing hair, esthetics, massage, and nail services.

name: Sagamok Elder
bio: Elder and Knowledge Keeper from Sagamok Anishnawbek sharing traditional teachings and cultural knowledge with the community.

name: Sagamok Language Speaker
bio: Anishinaabemowin language speaker from Sagamok Anishnawbek dedicated to preserving and teaching the Ojibwe language.

name: Sagamok Regalia Maker
bio: Traditional regalia maker from Sagamok Anishnawbek crafting powwow regalia and cultural items.

name: Sagamok Drummer
bio: Drummer and performer from Sagamok Anishnawbek participating in powwows and cultural events across Northern Ontario.

name: Sagamok Youth Worker
bio: Youth worker from Sagamok Anishnawbek supporting young people through cultural programs, workshops, and mentorship.

name: North Shore Healer
bio: Traditional healer serving North Shore communities with traditional medicine practices and wellness teachings.

name: Sagamok Cedar Harvester
bio: Cedar harvester from Sagamok Anishnawbek providing cedar products for ceremonies, crafts, and traditional uses.

name: Espanola Caterer
bio: Community caterer in Espanola providing food services for gatherings, events, and celebrations.

name: Serpent River Artist
bio: Anishinaabe artist from Serpent River First Nation creating works inspired by Northern Ontario landscapes and cultural teachings.
